title: Experience Orb Pickup Muted
description: The Experience Orb Pickup sound is now muted.
body:
This Resource Pack removes the experience pickup sound & replaces it with a blank muted audio file.
(This doesn't mute the Level Up sound that plays every 5 levels.)

![https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8fbca32c-d963-4b25-b54b-baf6a21b10a7.webp](https://www.bisecthosting.com/partners/custom-banners/8fbca32c-d963-4b25-b54b-baf6a21b10a7.webp)
Link: http://bisect.thenexusproject.net/
